programme.title: E2 - The Shepherd And His Lights
programme.desc: Francois Duruz, a former city dweller turned shepherd and watercolorist, finds in solitude, nature and light a profound balance. He has transformed his mountain refuge into an ephemeral gallery where landscapes, colors and emotions become one.

programme.title: E5 - La Molignee
programme.desc: On the road to the province of Namur and the Molignee valley, a picturesque location of high biological value and a Natura 2000 site. Detours to Sosoye and Falaen, among the most beautiful villages in Wallonia, the Abbey of Maredsous, Biesmeree and Florennes.

programme.title: E28 - Transformation Of An Old Farmhouse
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Perk, Flemish Brabant, to discover the transformation of an old farmhouse into a family home. Everything has been redesigned by Aurelie, the owner and interior architect, to bring light, create new rooms, and especially modernize it through decoration.

programme.title: E16 - Louis Gabriel Nouchi
programme.desc: Viviane welcomes her first menswear designer! Louis Gabriel Nouchi presents his 2023-2024 autumn-winter collection, inspired by the novel ''American Psycho'' by Bret Easton Ellis.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. programme.title: Fly Me to The Saitama – FROM BIWA LAKE WITH LOVE
programme.desc: A live-action film adaptation of Mineo Maya's “Fly Me to the Saitama” turned out to be a huge, unexpected box office hit of 2019. With the producers who took the demand for a sequel as real, the cast and crew got back together to complete the second chapter of the urban legend in Fly Me To The Saitama -FROM BIWA LAKE WITH LOVE-. In addition to the biting yet affectionate dissing of Saitama and the Kanto region in the first film, the sequel contains an even more scathing dissing of the Kansai region. Alongside costars GACKT and Fumi Nikaido, Ryo Kato and Tsubasa Masuwaka reprise their roles as members of the Saitama Liberation Front. A crucial protagonist who joins their battle, Kai Kikyo, the handsome leader of the Shiga Liberation Front, is played by Anne in her first role as male character. Akira Kashoji, the ruthless governor of Osaka and kingpin of the Kansai region who stands in the way of Rei and others, is played by Ainosuke Kataoka. In addition to Norika Fujiwara and

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: Entering the houses with the key entrusted to him by the clients, 'Koo Jung-tae', a real estate agent with a hobby of spying on other people's lives. He becomes intrigued by SNS influencer 'Han Sora'. She posts a photo of a vegan salad while actually eating convenience store sausage, prompting him to begin spying on her closely. ‘Koo Jung-tae', eventually sneaks into ‘Han Sora's house, discovers her lifeless body on the sofa. Soon after, he starts receiving threats from someone who knows he was there. As homicide detective 'Oh Young-joo's investigation closes in on him, ‘Koo Jung-tae' is compelled to search for the real culprit using clues from 'Han Sora's social media and the people around her.

programme.title: Don't Buy The Seller
programme.desc: ‘Soo-hyun' buys a used washing machine online after moving into her new place. When she receives a broken machine, she realizes she's been scammed and decides to make sure the seller doesn't get away with it! Eventually, Soo-hyun succeeds in finding the seller's online account, then leaves warnings that he is a fraudster under all his posts to stop him from selling. From then on, terrifying things start to happen to Soo-hyun. She led on ordinary life with an ordinary job, but everything in her daily life begins to fall apart, and an investigation to find the seller unfolds. Later, Soo-hyun goes to the seller's pace with Detective Joo, and discovers a dead body...

programme.title: Honest Candidate 2
programme.desc: After failing to win the Seoul mayoral election, Joo Sang-sook became an unemployable property and no parties will admit to associating with her in fear of bad press, but when she rescues a young man from drowning, she is suddenly pulled into spotlight and wins the election to become the Gangwon province governor. But her honesty sinks her approval rating and she resorts back to lying through her teeth. As fate would have it, her truth mouth returns! Not only that, her chief of staff Hee-cheol is cursed with the same truth bomb!

programme.desc: JoJo discovers that Gran Gran used to be in a band and decides that she wants to learn to play the drums. Gran Gran teaches JoJo how to play a beat, and eventually they form a new band!

programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: 64' Debat:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: E17 - Italy: The School That Excludes No One
programme.desc: Since the 1970s, Italy has put an end to separate school institutions and integrates all children with disabilities into mainstream education, where they are supported by special needs teachers. Here, the disability of some is seen as a source of richness for the collective. In France, nearly 50,000 children with disabilities could not be accommodated at the start of the 2025 school year, despite laws and commitments...

programme.title: E48 - The Pearl
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E40 - Lunch Box
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: E3 - Hairy Moments

But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

E15 - The Hunt For Cleopatra's Missing Tomb
programme.desc: She was the last pharaoh of Egypt and one of the most famous queens of all time, but her death in 31 B.C. has been shrouded in mystery. Cleopatra's body has been lost without a trace for over 2,000 years.

programme.title: E2 - Blitz
programme.desc: After defeating Poland, Hitler looks west, planning an attack into France that will take advantage of a weak point in their defences. British Prime Minister Churchill scrambles to evacuate Allied troops.

programme.desc: A car salesman has the visionary idea to start the first rental car company in America, and when he joins forces with cab company owner John Hertz, they spread their business across the country.

programme.title: Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Knowing that Mak, the middle-aged newspaper editor often misses his late spouse, his beloved children persuade him to date Siu Fung, the singer who lives next door. At this moment, Siu Fung's cousin, Uncle Sam, returns from the states and proposes to marry Siu Fung. One day, dispute happens between Sam and Mak which makes Siu Fung so mad with Mak...

programme.title: The Magnificent Butcher
programme.desc: Lam sai-wing is the mischievous student of Wong Fei-hung. His eagerness to help others often lands himself in some precarious situations. Master Kao upon hearing his God daughter and his only son's death seeks Wing to avenger their cruel death...

programme.title: Dear Japan
programme.desc: Amid the issues that regional communities face, local people are rethinking about traditional values and exploring new ways to live together beyond generations. This is a travel documentary visiting affectionate lives of this country.

programme.title: Ideas To Protect Ourselves From Disasters
programme.desc: Introduce selected news and other information programs related to disasters and reconstructions with experts' comments. The program also focuses on ongoing projects to protect communities from disasters.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: An original sci-fi drama based on Ogawa Satoshi's novel, scripted by Yoshida Reiko. In 2125, Mars hosts 100,000 settlers under ISDA's control, as tension brews between authority and freedom. Lili-E1102 (Suri Lin), a visually impaired woman born on Mars, endures harsh training to reach Earth-for one reason: to meet Shiraishi Aoto (Suda Masaki), a young ISDA officer, and honor a secret promise. But when a catastrophic event derails her mission, it sparks a chain of schemes between Mars and Earth-leading to consequences far greater than anyone imagined.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: Hideyoshi and Koichiro are assigned to secure the war-torn region of Harima, caught between the Oda and Mori forces, taking over from Araki Murashige (Tortoise Matsumoto). Though expected to be a difficult mission, they gain a powerful ally in Kodera Kanbei (Kura Yuki), the lord of Himeji Castle, who skillfully brings the local clans over to Oda's side. Following Hanbei's strategy, Hideyoshi pushes further west into Nishi-Harima. Meanwhile, Koichiro is tasked with the siege of Takeda Castle in Tajima, facing his first battle as supreme commander.

programme.title: E109
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E13 - Cheese The Day
programme.desc: Michael Symon is all about that cheesy goodness, starting with a Crispy Grilled Cheese with Blueberry Jam and Mushrooms.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: The Mystery of the Maleficent Mosquitoes
programme.desc: When swarms of mosquitoes mysteriously descend on the park, the kids' summer movie night is in danger of being cancelled unless Addison and her friends can figure out a way to stop them.

programme.title: Fairy Story
programme.desc: A dark forest gives Smorph the shivers, could there be a dragon inside? Perhaps it just needs a brave and smart fairy to investigate.

programme.title: Day of the Birdman
programme.desc: Ricky is reminded of his childhood pet Mr. Chicken. After creating Picasso-inspired art on an egg box, he decides to fly like a bird, making an ingenious collage to help him try to find his old feathered friend.

programme.title: Inland Surf Park
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents an innovative Surf Park in North Wales, pet tech for cats and dogs, the engineering wizardry in massage chairs and the vertical gardens making Mexico's highways greener.

programme.title: Stubble Fires
programme.desc: There is a dire situation in a large city in India. A group of students is protesting because the city's air has been replaced with an unbreathable icky cloud of pollution, and the authorities don't know why! Pluvia and Nubess are sent to solve the problem.

programme.title: The Dragon Duel
programme.desc: Rose, Hawk, and the others have a new Dragon Riding Teacher, Sir George, who favors Vicky and dislikes Coach Beast. They settle on a huge dragon tournament at Castle Beast. In the final obstacle course, it's Rose vs. Vicky, but Vicky isn't playing fair.

programme.title: How do Fish Glow in the Dark?
programme.desc: Bioluminescence is the ability of a living organism to create and emit light produced by a chemical reaction. About 90% of the animals living in the deep ocean create some form of bioluminescent light. Fireflies, glow worms and some fungi can do this too.

programme.title: The Best Toy
programme.desc: The children can't decide which is the best toy in the world. Is it Vik's transformer, Mai's pencil, or Oto's ball? Or maybe Yoko's wooden stick? With some magic and imagination, a wooden stick can be all sorts of things.

programme.title: How do Fish Glow in the Dark?
programme.desc: Bioluminescence is the ability of a living organism to create and emit light produced by a chemical reaction. About 90% of the animals living in the deep ocean create some form of bioluminescent light. Fireflies, glow worms and some fungi can do this too.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Blue Planet
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery are at the spaceport. But while preparing to embark on an expedition into space, they fall into the ocean, which becomes the destination of their new adventures.

programme.title: Corals and Reefs
programme.desc: A coral reef exploration goes downhill when Mr. Battery is abducted by an electric stingray.

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: Chocolate Cake
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula decide to prepare a delicious chocolate cake. Telmo wants to show everyone how he manages to mix all the ingredients, so Grown-up keeps an eye on the kids while they perform the dangerous tasks.

programme.title: Blue Planet
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery are at the spaceport. But while preparing to embark on an expedition into space, they fall into the ocean, which becomes the destination of their new adventures.

programme.title: Corals and Reefs
programme.desc: A coral reef exploration goes downhill when Mr. Battery is abducted by an electric stingray.

programme.title: Day of the Birdman
programme.desc: Ricky is reminded of his childhood pet Mr. Chicken. After creating Picasso-inspired art on an egg box, he decides to fly like a bird, making an ingenious collage to help him try to find his old feathered friend.

programme.title: Slam Dunk Dynamite!
programme.desc: Gladiator Dynamite puts Dr Dan and Dr Raph's core muscles to the test, Dr Chris shoots hoops with a basketball dunking champ, while Dr Ronx is lifted into the air by finger power!

programme.title: Computer Programme
programme.desc: When we need a robot to do several things many times, we save these instructions in the form of a computer program. Find out more about how these programs are used and written.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: There have been a few occasions when spacecraft have been lost in space. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at several of these adventures. In some cases, the spacecraft that were lost, were remarkably found again.

programme.title: Slam Dunk Dynamite!
programme.desc: Gladiator Dynamite puts Dr Dan and Dr Raph's core muscles to the test, Dr Chris shoots hoops with a basketball dunking champ, while Dr Ronx is lifted into the air by finger power!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

E7 - Japan
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan’s bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan’s nightlife. Before they head out from their Japanese adventures, Rooftop and Catfish finish the trip learning how to drift and even attempt jumping into their drifting car. After such an action packed visit to Japan, where will the duo’s travels take them next?

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: Search4Hurt S4E1 -We’re back
programme.desc: TV's most savage social experiment returns as Search4Hurt starts its mission to find the fittest everyday Aussies to join their hybrid sporting team, starting with HurtCamp.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips S1E2 -Kamilaroi Highway (Part 1)
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in New South Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificent landscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way through a region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here S1E5 -Ulaanbaatar
programme.desc: Half of Mongolia lives in this city. And they drive their cars like they ride their horses: fast and furious.

programme.title: Trucking Hell S2E6 -Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E2 - Learning How to Be a Good Friend!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns how to be a good friend! When a new, shy student named Ash the firetruck joins the school, Buster sees he's all alone & invites him to play. Then, Buster learns another important lesson when he starts to lose a game of snakes & ladders & decides to cheat. From learning that sports aren't all about winning to standing up for his friends during a sleepover, Buster is on his way to being the best friend ever!

programme.title: E2 - Baby John Learns to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Baby John is learning how to be healthy! First, he learns all about mealtime safety, like eating slowly, taking small bites & staying seated. Then, he discovers that even though he doesn't always want to rest, naptime is important to help him feel better when he's cranky. The health lessons continue as he visits the eye doctor for the first time & learns that it's better to use lotion instead of scratching an itchy bug bite.

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. The lessons continue as Pogo accidentally ruins Newt's teddy-shaped hedge & learns to tell the truth, & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy Oddsprouts!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. programme.title: E2

programme.title: E16 - Realm Of The Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman.He studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: Wild Mexico
programme.desc: Mexico, an ancient land full of diversity and mystery. It is home to a vast wilderness of oceans, deserts, jungle and unique creatures found nowhere else on Earth.

programme.title: E4 - Bernese Mountain Dog,Afghan,Portugese Water Dog,Cairn Terrier,Alaskan Mal..
programme.desc: Meet the Bernese Mountain Dog, Afghan, Portugese Water Dog, Cairn Terrier, and Alaskan Malamute.

programme.desc: The team scours the Sonoran Desert for North America's mightiest mouse: the carnivorous grasshopper mouse.

programme.title: E16 - Realm Of The Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman.He studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: E2 - Haunted Huntress
programme.desc: In the Serengeti, discover how the leopardess' cub journeys dangerously into adulthood.

programme.title: Wild Mexico
programme.desc: Mexico, an ancient land full of diversity and mystery. It is home to a vast wilderness of oceans, deserts, jungle and unique creatures found nowhere else on Earth.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: Osprey: Sea Raptor
programme.desc: Wade into a saltwater marsh along the Connecticut River to witness the heartwarming reunion of two ospreys who’ve been mates for a decade. Witness their highs and lows over a single summer as they raise their chicks and dodge a host of predators.

programme.title: E1 - A Tale of Two Penguins
programme.desc: At the water’s edge a brave group of male penguins gather, preparing to make the dangerous journey ashore. With many threats ahead, there is safety in number and these petite penguins have important business to attend. It’s time to breed and they must find a burrow before the females arrive.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: E5 - Sanctuary
programme.desc: There’s strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it’s the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival. For these animals, protection means isolation – finding sanctuary from the threats outside their boundaries.

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Tap into one of the least understood areas of animal science: sleep. Check out adaptations made by the most extreme snoozers on Earth, from tiny bees who doze for 20 hours a day to enormous elephants who survive on just two precious hours of rest.

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Tap into one of the least understood areas of animal science: sleep. Check out adaptations made by the most extreme snoozers on Earth, from tiny bees who doze for 20 hours a day to enormous elephants who survive on just two precious hours of rest.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E4 - Operation Rhino
programme.desc: Across Africa 97% of black rhinos have been killed for their horns. In 1997 the species was declared officially extinct in Zambia. But now, thanks to an ambitious reintroduction plan, they’re back. Poaching hasn’t gone away – their horns are still prized in Asian medicine. But a small, dedicated team are fighting to keep them safe. This is the frontline of conservation – it doesn’t get any tougher.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E41
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E756
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E7 - 超腦少年現場造手機
programme.desc: 邀請了馬清運、伊能靜、楊芸晴等嘉賓擔任「超腦護航員」；節目根據“八大未來力”的概念來進行項目設置，少年們需要用創造性思維激發想像力，利用從紙筆到程式設計來破解難題，從而喚醒大腦活力，選拔出最具“未來力”的少年。
